summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Football League Management, Quiz Answering, and Viewer/Spectator features in the Arabic youth club app. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI flows verified for admin league management, viewer page, and student profile page.

design_issues.screen: Admin League Tab, Viewer Page, Student Profile Page
issues: React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - caused by React/Visual Editor wrapper spans. Does not affect functionality but could impact SSR/hydration.

passed_tests: GET /api/teams - Returns all 4 teams (sadara, nukhba, zaama, riyada)
PUT /api/league/matches/:id - Updates match score and is_played status
GET /api/league/standings - Returns standings sorted by points
Standings update correctly after match results (wins=3pts, draw=1pt)
POST /api/quiz/answer - Submits answer and awards points for correct answers
Duplicate quiz answer prevention returns 400 error
GET /api/quiz/submissions - Returns student submissions for competition
GET /api/viewer/all-data - Returns complete data (students, teams, competitions, matches, standings, star_player, categories)
Admin Page - League tab loads with standings table and add match button
Admin Page - Add match dialog has team selects and date input
Viewer Page - Shows stats cards, star player, league standings, top 10, teams ranking, active competitions
Student Profile Page - Shows league standings table with 'my team' badge
Student Profile Page - Quiz answering shows correct/incorrect feedback with color coding
Quiz flow awards points to student on correct answer
critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warning in table components (AdminPage, ViewerPage, StudentProfilePage) - appears to be caused by Visual Editor wrapper spans inside tbody elements. Consider removing debug/preview wrappers in production build.
seed_data_creation: Test competition and quiz question created/deleted during test_quiz_answer_flow test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All league management APIs tested and working. Quiz answering flow tested with points awarded correctly. Viewer page displays all data. Admin can manage matches via league tab. Note: hydration warnings in console are from Visual Editor spans wrapping table rows - cosmetic issue only.

league_management.create_match: PASS - Admin can create matches via POST /api/league/matches
league_management.update_score: PASS - Admin can update match scores via PUT /api/league/matches/:id
league_management.delete_match: PASS - Admin can delete matches via DELETE /api/league/matches/:id
league_management.standings_calculation: PASS - Standings calculated correctly with wins=3pts, draws=1pt, losses=0pt

viewer_page.league_standings: PASS - Shows standings table with all 4 teams
viewer_page.matches_display: PASS - Shows match results with team names and scores
viewer_page.teams_ranking: PASS - Shows teams ranked by total student points

student_profile.league_standings: PASS - Shows league standings with 'my team' badge
student_profile.quiz_answering: PASS - Student can answer quiz questions with immediate feedback

quiz_system.correct_answer_points: PASS - Points awarded for correct answers
quiz_system.duplicate_prevention: PASS - Cannot answer same question twice
